factors.weather: Highly heat-sensitive. Apr-Jun yield drops 25-35%. Top-icing & cold chain non-negotiable.
factors.monsoon_impact: Pre-monsoon (May): supply tight. Monsoon (Jun-Sep): bunch quality drops, fungal risk.
disruption: Wilting in transit if break in cold chain >2hrs
factors.fuel_sensitivity: High — daily multi-trip from peri-urban farms

factors.weather: Heat-tolerant. Pre-monsoon ripening accelerates — DC ripening must be staggered.
factors.monsoon_impact: Cyclones in TN/AP coast disrupt rake movement. Monitor IMD South Peninsula bulletins.
disruption: Cyclone risk Apr-Jun in Bay of Bengal
factors.fuel_sensitivity: Med — long-haul truck from TN/AP, diesel exposure

factors.weather: Pre-monsoon heat causes fruit-drop. May-Jun = lean season. Prices typically peak.
factors.monsoon_impact: Late monsoon flooding (Sep-Oct) destroys Kolar belt. Plan buffer Aug.

factors.weather: Hardy. Mild dip in peak summer.
factors.monsoon_impact: Generally robust through monsoon.

factors.weather: Cold-storage commodity. May-Jun pulls from Punjab/UP cold storage — quality declines.
factors.monsoon_impact: Cold-storage dependence Jul-Oct. Storage rot risk if power outages.

factors.weather: Heat-tolerant. Smaller acreage = thinner supply buffer.
factors.monsoon_impact: Niche varietal — Cauvery basin disputes can affect supply.
disruption: Limited vendor base (3) = vendor concentration risk

risks: MH rabi outflow tail; export ban watch
MH rabi outflow tail; export ban watch

factors.weather: Maharashtra unseasonal rain = price shock. Pre-monsoon = peak rabi outflow.
factors.monsoon_impact: Jul-Sep storage rot risk (rabi). Kharif (Oct-Dec) at risk if heavy rain.

risks: Wedding demand pulls inventory; cyclone watch
Wedding demand pulls inventory; cyclone watch

factors.weather: TN/Kerala cyclones disrupt supply. Drought-resilient but yield 12-month lag.
factors.monsoon_impact: SW monsoon onset (Jun) drives wedding-coconut demand spike vs supply lag.

factors.weather: Extremely heat-sensitive. May-Jun yield drops 30-40%. Wilts in transit.
factors.monsoon_impact: Fungal rot risk. Cold chain mandatory.

factors.weather: ⚠ FLAG: Mar 8,279 vs Jan 401 (20x). Likely seasonal harvest peak Mar-Jun in TN.
factors.monsoon_impact: Post-monsoon Sep-Oct lull. Peak Mar-Jun aligns with wedding sambar demand.
disruption: TN single-state dependence — Cauvery dispute, TN bandhs

factors.weather: Same as Natti — pre-monsoon fruit-drop.
factors.monsoon_impact: Sep-Oct flooding disruption. 2024 Kolar floods reference.

factors.weather: Heat-tolerant. Stable through summer.
factors.monsoon_impact: Mild — water-intensive crop benefits from monsoon.

factors.weather: Cool-season crop. May-Jun yields halve. Peak Oct-Feb.
factors.monsoon_impact: Fungal rot risk. Ethylene-sensitive.

factors.weather: Cool-season. Summer yields drop 30%.
factors.monsoon_impact: Yield recovers post-monsoon.

factors.weather: Pure summer SKU. May = peak. Jun onward demand collapses with monsoon.
factors.monsoon_impact: Demand collapses with monsoon onset. Procurement must taper Jun.

factors.weather: Pre-monsoon peak harvest. Mar-Jun strong supply.
factors.monsoon_impact: Peak demand DURING monsoon — Jul-Sep is upside.

factors.weather: Year-round. Heat-tolerant.
factors.monsoon_impact: Ringspot virus risk Jul-Sep.

factors.weather: Climate-controlled — least weather-exposed. Summer cooling cost up.
factors.monsoon_impact: Mostly insulated.

factors.weather: High-altitude origin (Ooty 2,200m). Monsoon = peak season.
factors.monsoon_impact: Nilgiris landslides Jul-Sep can cut off supply.

factors.weather: Heat-tolerant.
factors.monsoon_impact: Thrips/mites May-Jul
